title: packera bolanderi var. bolanderi
intro: Packera bolanderi var. bolanderi, also known as Bolander's ragwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been employed in the treatment of various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and treat respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy in folk medicine. Bolander's ragwort can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from ailments.
